title: Lending protocol Bonzo loses 77% of value locked as $9 million oracle exploit rattles Hedera
summary: Bonzo Lend lost approximately $9.05 million after an attacker exploited a verification flaw in a third-party Supra oracle contract on the Hedera network.

title: Crypto IPO market stalls as capital rotates to AI and macro uncertainty weighs
summary: Funding constraints and investor caution, not regulation, are delaying crypto IPOs, according to Cohen & Company Capital Markets' Christian Lopez.

title: The UK has finally shown it’s serious about crypto
summary: Several recent regulatory steps indicate the UK might finally stop dragging its feet when it comes to crypto, argues Wirex CEO Chet Shah.

title: Bitcoin treasury company Empery Digital sold about half of its BTC stack
summary: It's a sign of the times as the troubled company swaps its bitcoin treasury ambitions for AI data centers.

title: AI found an Ethereum bug that could take validators offline, but humans had to prove it
summary: The Ethereum Foundation pointed coordinated AI agents at the software its validators run and got a remotely triggerable crash out of it. It also got a pile of confident, well-written findings that were not bugs at all.
